title: P5 (QUA-1024) EA source-dirs hygiene — move QUA-* artifacts out of framework/EAs/
description:
## Root cause

`framework/EAs/QM5_1003_davey_baseline_3bar/` (and likely the other EA dirs) contains ~20 files matching `QUA-649_*.{md,json,signal,csv}` mixed in with `.mq5/.ex5/.set/.mqh`. Codex globs the directory on every edit, polluting context by 20–40%.

## Patch plan

1. `git mv framework/EAs/*/QUA-* docs/ops/QUA-archived/` (preserve under-issue grouping; mirror the per-EA tree if useful for forensics).
2. Add `.gitignore` rules:
   - `framework/EAs/*/QUA-*`
   - `framework/EAs/*/*.signal`
3. Optional pre-commit hook that rejects `framework/EAs/*/QUA-*` paths so this does not regress.

## Acceptance

- `find framework/EAs -name 'QUA-*'` returns empty.
- EA source dirs contain only `.mq5/.mqh/.ex5/.set`, JSON parameter cards, and run outputs that belong there.
- A subsequent Codex edit to any EA `.mq5` file does not pull QUA-* files into context.

## Why this matters

Meta:Work commit ratio is 313:1 since 2026-05-05 (audit). Reducing per-edit context size also lowers token spend on every EA touch — compounds with P4 and P6 reductions.

## References

- Parent: QUA-1024 (Board Advisor token-burn audit 2026-05-09)
- DL-031 routing: V5 Framework Implementation project (framework/* hygiene).
